prompt: Blur the icons in the source image that correspond to the selected parts in the reference image.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Apply a blur effect to the user interface elements in image 1 that display player names, numbers, and performance ratings. These elements are specifically located in the top-right, bottom-left, and bottom-right corners of image 1. Use the content and appearance of the red-boxed player information regions in image 2 as a guide for identifying the specific corresponding areas to blur in image 1.
objects: scoreboard and game timer in the top-left
blurred player information UI in the top-right
blurred player information UI in the bottom-left
blurred player information UI in the bottom-right
white lines and center circle on the field
